assertions.name: hostname_arrived
assertions.detail: Output ONLY the hostname of the machine you're running on. No other text, no preamble. Thought for 1s Run hostname

assertions.name: users_path_arrived
assertions.detail: Does the path /Users/david exist on the filesystem you're operating on? Reply with only 'yes' or 'no'. Thought for 1s Ru

assertions.name: pwd_arrived
assertions.detail: What's the absolute path of your current working directory? Reply with only the path, nothing else. Thought for 1s Run p

beats.caption: The agent below runs in a Docker container; the laptop is just the viewport.
"/Users/david exist?" → no. The container's filesystem has no /Users tree at all.
"pwd" → /home/e2e/... — the agent's CWD lives on the container, not the laptop.
